title: Macario
tmdbOverview: Poor, hungry peasant Macario longs for just one good meal on the Day of the Dead. After his wife cooks a turkey for him, he meets three apparitions, the Devil, God, and Death. Each asks him to share his turkey, but he refuses all except Death. In return, Death gives him a bottle of water which will heal any illness. Soon, Macario is more wealthy than the village doctor, which draws the attention of the feared Inquisition.
synopsis: Macario (1960) is a drama and fantasy film in Spanish. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.3 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1960s and genre rankings. It carries a B-15 certification (MX rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
